description: Nitroba University Harassment (Digital Corpora) — a professor (lilytuckrige@yahoo.com) receives harassing email sent through anonymous remailers; a network tap captures the traffic. The task is sender attribution: tie the anonymous activity to a real identity via cleartext webmail sessions and the originating host.
ground_truth_type: validation (Tier 1) — hashes published + password-protected teacher solution

expected_findings.note: Host 192.168.15.4 used anonymous remailers (willselfdestruct.com, sendanonymousemail.net) to send harassment to lilytuckrige@yahoo.com, and exposed an authenticated webmail identity (jcoachj@gmail.com) in cleartext from the same host — attributing the anonymous sender to a real account.
DNS query landscape. Optional corroboration, not core to attribution.
